reviewSummary.summary: The draft captures the main actionable controls but contains a duplicate password field, weak naming, and a missing username textbox which is required by the workflow. Some locators could also be improved for stability and semantic clarity.

issues.message: The username textbox required by the workflow and manual tests is missing from the approved elements list.
issues.suggested_fix: Add the username textbox element using a stable locator such as xpath=//input[@name='ion-input-0'] and name it username_textbox.

issues.message: Two elements represent the same password field: one located by placeholder and one by id. This creates ambiguity for downstream automation.
issues.suggested_fix: Keep only the id-based locator (id=password) and remove the placeholder-based locator.

issues.message: The element name 'password' is generic and does not clearly indicate the control type.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename the element to password_textbox for clarity and consistency with other form field naming.

issues.message: The locator combines icon aria-label and normalized text which may be unstable if UI text or icon structure changes.
issues.suggested_fix: Prefer a locator that targets the icon aria-label directly such as xpath=//ion-fab-button[.//ion-icon[@aria-label='home']].

issues.message: The locator includes text matching which may be brittle if the visible label changes.
issues.suggested_fix: Prefer a locator based on the icon aria-label only such as xpath=//ion-fab-button[.//ion-icon[@aria-label='arrow back']].

issues.message: Naming does not fully express the navigation intent described in the workflow.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename to home_navigation_button to better reflect its role.

issues.message: The name reflects the icon rather than the user action.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename to back_navigation_button to reflect navigation behavior.

approved_elements.name: username_textbox
approved_elements.description: Textbox used to enter the username for authentication.

approved_elements.name: password_textbox
approved_elements.description: Password input field used to enter the user's password.

approved_elements.name: sign_in_button
approved_elements.description: Button used to submit the login form.

approved_elements.name: home_navigation_button
approved_elements.description: Navigation control that redirects the user to the home page.

approved_elements.name: back_navigation_button
approved_elements.description: Navigation control that navigates back to the home page from the login screen.
